content:
- Manual browser verification succeeded in a real headless Chromium `file://` session against a temporary local HTTP target.
- Updated `.ralph/tasks/story-09-ui/task-02-configurable-auth-and-api-url.md` to `status=done` with `<passes>true</passes>`, ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, committed all repo changes, and pushed `9d7ab05` to `origin/master`.
- Validation evidence for this completed task: `make check` passed, `make lint` passed, `make test` passed, and the browser session confirmed token-hidden UI state plus configured-target request behavior.

- Read prior progress: last completed work was story-09 UI task 02 with make check/test/lint and browser verification passing.
- Read list-active-tasks skill guidance and current Ralph summaries; active task summary appears empty while done task summary contains completed stories and bug fixes.
- Refresh Ralph summaries and confirm choose-task rules next; if there are truly no active tasks, run make check/test/lint and either add bugs for failures or touch .ralph/STOP.

- Refreshed task summaries and confirmed .ralph/current_tasks.md is empty of active tasks.
- Read Makefile to determine actual stack/check flow: Go project, make check delegates to lint, lint runs gofmt -l plus go vet ./..., test runs go test ./....
- Running make check, make test, and make lint now because there are no selectable tasks left; any failure becomes a new bug task.

- Confirmed there are no active tasks in .ralph/current_tasks.md after refreshing summaries.
- Validated the repository on 2026-04-30 with make check, make test, and make lint; all commands passed cleanly.
- No new bug tasks were needed, so the backlog is complete for now and .ralph/STOP should exist.
